# Config-lifecycle Decision Record: blast-tier taxonomy + per-controller actuation bounds

## Context
Tree line **A1** (#14564 map) — the epic's leaf 1: everything cites it. The graduation (#14456, quorum 2026-07-04) resolved OQ1+OQ2 to AC-grade shapes; this leaf writes them as the Decision Record extending ADR-0026's family (the #14418 standalone precedent — never re-parenting closed epics).

## The Problem
Without the DR, every T-D/T-E/T-F leaf re-argues tier boundaries and actuation rights per-PR. The graduated content is settled; it needs its authority document: the T0–T3 taxonomy × the deploymentClass shift rule, the dual-semantic range clause (the four live `≤0-disables` leaves get declared envelopes; boundary-crossing = tier escalation), schema-declared delegation sentinels, and the per-controller bounds (install writes overlay pre-SSOT-live; drift-heal emits PR-shaped deltas; runtime tuner session-or-next-boot only; B4 inviolate).

## The Architectural Reality
learn/agentos/decisions/ sibling (next-free number verified at authoring); consensus-gate applies (Discussion-graduated substrate: the §6.6 ledger travels in the PR body); ADR-0019 is the read-gate (critical-gates rule 10) and the knowledge-plane this DR governs writes INTO.

## The Fix
One PR: the DR (Context/Decision/Rejected/Consequences/Lifecycle per house shape) + the 0031 composition-table row + re-review triggers (any PR adding a config controller or touching tier semantics cites it).

## Acceptance Criteria
- [ ] All four graduated clause-sets present as normative text (taxonomy, ranges, sentinels, controller bounds).
- [ ] §6.6 ledger carried; consensus-gate satisfied in the PR body.
- [ ] Re-review triggers enumerate the controller/tier surfaces.
- [ ] Cross-family review (Grace holds the OQ2/OQ3 reviewer hook).

## Out of Scope
Any implementation (T-B…T-H leaves cite this).

## Related
Parent #14564 (line A1) · source #14456 (graduated) · ADR-0019/0026 · gates every sibling tranche. Sweeps: 03:47Z clean.
